choice_effects: Mood -1, last trained stat -5, small chance Practice Poor
Success (~15%): Practice Perfect ◯ | Fail (~85%): Mood -1, last trained stat -10, likely Practice Poor
notes: Training failure event. Triggers when failure rate was 1-19% (~guaranteed) or 20-79% (~70% chance). Choice 1 is safer. Choice 2 gambles for Practice Perfect but usually makes things worse.

choice_effects: Energy +10, Mood -2, last trained stat -10 and two random stats -10, chance Practice Poor
Success (~15%): Practice Perfect ◯ | Fail (~85%): Mood -3, three random stats -10 each, Practice Poor
notes: Severe training failure event. Triggers on high failure rates (20%+). Choice 1 at least gives energy back. Choice 2 is very risky.

choices: (Could I have some new training gear?)
(Could I have some of those carrots?)
choice_effects: Energy -10, Power +20, Guts +20, Skill Hint: Beeline Burst +1
Energy +30, Stamina +20, Skill Hint: Breath of Fresh Air +1
notes: URA Finale scenario event. Choice 2 (carrots) is generally best for energy recovery. Choice 1 better if you need Power/Guts and have enough energy. Higher Power increases chance for this event to appear.

choice_effects: Energy +30
All Stats +5
Skill Pts +35
notes: Character-specific event appearing for most trainees in January. Choice text varies by character but effects are generally: energy, stats, or skill points. Skill points (choice 3) is usually best value. Pick energy if below 50.

choice_effects: Power +10
Guts +10
notes: Character-specific event during Classic Year summer camp. Choice text and stat types vary by character. Pick whichever stat aligns with your build.

choices: This is too sketchy. Let's quit while we still can.
choice_effects: Success (20-30%): All Stats +20 | Fail (70-80%): Mood -2, All Stats -15, Night Owl
Success (40-60%): Corner Recovery ◯, Straightaway Recovery skills | Fail (40-60%): Mood -2, Energy -20
Success (70-80%): Max Energy +12, Energy +40, cure negative conditions | Fail (20-30%): Energy -20, Mood -2, Practice Poor
Success (80-85%): Energy +20, Mood +1, Charming ◯ | Fail (15-20%): Energy -10, Mood -1, Practice Poor (random)
Energy +10 (guaranteed)
notes: Random event. Health Chakra (choice 3) is safest and most useful — high success rate, cures conditions, big energy. Charm Chakra (choice 4) is safest overall. Strength is a trap. Quit option is guaranteed but low value.

choice_effects: No choice. ~25% chance to lose Energy -10 each turn. ~25% chance to also lose Mood -1 from that energy loss.
notes: Negative condition event (no choices). Night Owl activates randomly after turns. Cure via Infirmary (+20 energy, chance to remove) or Rest. Appears for all characters. Visit Infirmary when possible.

choice_effects: No choice. Grants Skin Outbreak condition: mood may randomly decrease by one stage.
notes: Negative condition event (no choices). Cure via Infirmary or Rest with 70+ energy recovery.

choice_effects: No choice. Grants Slacker condition: chance trainee won't show up for training, wasting a turn.
notes: Negative condition event (no choices). Cure ASAP via Infirmary or training with reporter Etsuko Otonashi.

choice_effects: No choice. Grants stats, skill hints, and aptitude increases. Bonuses scale with parent compatibility (double circle) and legacy star count.
notes: Occurs in April of Years 2 and 3. No choices. Better parents = better bonuses.

choice_effects: No choice. Training facilities upgrade, increasing stat gains from training.
notes: Automatic scenario event. Training levels increase at set turn intervals.

choice_effects: No choice. Director evaluates performance. Multiple variants (4 IDs) with different outcomes based on progress.
notes: Periodic scenario event. No player choices.
